title: AMAI Changelog Audit Entry
description: Schema for a single audit trail entry in changelog_audit.jsonl. Each entry records an AI-mediated change to AMAI files.

uid.description: UUID v4 unique identifier for this audit entry

actor.description: Who made the change: human (manual), ai (skill/command), system (hook/scheduled task)

actor_id.description: Specific identity of the actor — e.g. 'onboarding', 'pruning', 'conscience', 'calibrate', 'simon', 'maintenance-agent'

module.description: The AMAI module area affected — e.g. 'identity/values', 'goals/current_focus', 'signals/observations'

description.description: Human-readable description of what changed and why

files_changed.description: Relative paths of files that were modified
